title: Hi there, I'm Chenyang Gu, an Embodied AI Learner💪
tagline: 🎓 Undergraduate researcher at Peking University (EECS, 2022–2026), working towards General Policy for Real-World Embodied AI — spanning VLA Models, World Action Models, and Reinforcement Learning. 📄 Published 10 papers at CVPR, ICLR, NeurIPS, ICRA, RSS, IROS & CoRL, with first-author paper accepted by CVPR 2026 & co-first paper accepted by NeurIPS 2025, CVPR 2025. 🐱 Proud cat parent of Dàntǎ (Egg Tart). ☕️ Feel free to reach out — always open to discussions and potential collaborations!

rotatingSubtitles: play with lovely cat, Egg Tart

pets.name: Egg Tart
pets.title: Passionate Code Engineer
pets.description: A British Shorthair Golden Shaded born on June 27, 2025. Egg Tart is ridiculously adorable — soft golden fur, big round eyes, and a talent for stealing the warmest spot on any surface. When I'm not training robots, she's my favorite companion.
